name: 2048 Shoot Merge Number 3D
description: A fresh 3D take on classic 2048! Aim, shoot and merge numbered blocks (2→4→8→…→2048) for satisfying upgrades. Match numbers to merge, boost your score and clear space. Intuitive one-touch controls make it easy to learn, but strategize to avoid filling the board! Enjoy crisp 3D visuals and smooth animations as you chase 2048 (and beyond) in endless mode. Play offline anytime, train your brain, beat your high score—perfect for casual breaks and logic fans!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
